sentences.english: Do you prefer using public transportation or driving your own car?
sentences.korean: 대중교통과 자가용 중 어느 것을 선호합니까?

sentences.english: I prefer using public transportation in most situations.
First it's much cheaper than owning a car when you factor in gas insurance maintenance and parking fees.
sentences.korean: 첫째 기름값 보험 유지비 주차비를 고려하면 자가용보다 훨씬 저렴해요.

sentences.english: Second I can use my commute time productively — reading or listening to podcasts — instead of staring at traffic.
sentences.korean: 둘째 교통 체증을 바라보는 대신 통근 시간을 생산적으로 쓸 수 있어요 — 책을 읽거나 팟캐스트를 들으면서.

sentences.english: Finally using public transit reduces my carbon footprint which matters to me as someone who cares about the environment.
sentences.korean: 마지막으로 대중교통 이용은 탄소 발자국을 줄여줘요. 환경을 생각하는 사람으로서 중요한 일이에요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
options: Long Commute vs. Small Apartment Near Work
Gap Year — Good Idea or Not
